title: Remove Empty Lines
description: Delete blank lines from pasted text while keeping your content order intact.
name: Remove Empty Lines
intro: Use this tool to strip empty or whitespace-only lines from notes, copied text, exported lists, and content pulled from PDFs or email threads.

faq.q: Does it remove lines that only contain spaces?
faq.a: Yes. Whitespace-only lines are treated as empty lines and removed.

faq.q: Does it change the order of my text?
faq.a: No. It only removes blank lines and keeps the original line order.

title: Trim Lines
description: Remove leading and trailing spaces from every line without changing the line order.
name: Trim Lines
intro: Use Trim Lines to clean whitespace around every line in a block of text while preserving the original line structure.
keywords: remove leading trailing spaces from each line

faq.q: Does this remove spaces inside a sentence?
faq.a: No. It only removes whitespace from the start and end of each line.

faq.q: Will it preserve empty lines?
faq.a: Yes. Empty lines stay in place; only leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed.

title: Replace Tabs With Spaces
description: Convert every tab character into four spaces for cleaner formatting and consistent alignment.
name: Replace Tabs With Spaces
intro: Replace Tabs With Spaces is useful when pasted content, TSV data, or copied code looks uneven between apps. This version converts each tab into four spaces.

faq.q: How many spaces does each tab become?
faq.a: This tool replaces each tab with four spaces.

faq.q: Does it change anything besides tabs?
faq.a: No. It only replaces tab characters and leaves the rest of the content unchanged.
